title: Expose MCP read-only frontdoor
goal: Expose ask context build and answer grounding verify over MCP after CLI/Core semantics are stable.

acceptance.assertion: MCP tools/resources are read-only and never trigger implicit snapshot_create.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: MCP output uses the same request/context/verdict semantics as CLI/Core.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: MCP boundary forbids Git, shell, patch, PR, auto-review, auto-fix, auto-merge and secret-read actions.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: MCP smoke or contract tests cover ask context and grounding verification shapes.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.unblocked_by: RBGV-V1-T006 verified via Lenskit PR #936; dependencies RBGV-V1-T003, RBGV-V1-T005 and RBV1-T010 are verified.
